criteria.name: Compatibility with current trestle code
criteria.why: Lower change risk helps deliver a working MVP quickly.

criteria.name: Migration complexity
criteria.why: We need an approach that can evolve without rewriting everything.

criteria.name: Interoperability
criteria.why: Cross-tool verification and ecosystem alignment are long-term goals.

criteria.name: Metadata and provenance support
criteria.why: Auditability and traceability matter for compliance workflows.

options.name: Custom minimal detached envelope
options.notes: Fastest to implement; maps directly to POC-01 detached .sig flow.

options.name: DSSE-style envelope
options.notes: Strong ecosystem fit for supply chain attestations and provenance.

options.name: JWS-style envelope
options.notes: Good standards story, but extra JOSE complexity for early MVP.

migration_path: MVP: custom detached envelope with payload hash, algorithm, and signature bytes.
Near-term: add explicit provenance fields (tool version, signer id, timestamp, build id).
Phase 2: add DSSE-compatible schema adapter and dual-emit mode.
Phase 3: default to DSSE style while maintaining backward verification for MVP signatures.
